prompt:
The workspace contains roman.py (a function `to_roman(n)` that converts an integer 1..3999 to a Roman numeral) and test_roman.py (a pytest suite). The implementation has BUGS: running the tests fails. Your job is to FIX roman.py so the entire test suite passes. Do NOT edit test_roman.py — fix the implementation only.

Use run_command to run the tests (e.g. `python3 -m pytest -q test_roman.py` or `python3 test_roman.py`), read the failures, and edit roman.py until all tests pass. When all tests pass, ensure roman.py is saved in the workspace root, then declare the task complete.
grade_note: grade.py runs a FRESH, HIDDEN battery of to_roman cases against the agent's roman.py (not the visible test_roman.py, so it cannot be gamed by editing the visible suite). output_match = fraction of hidden cases passing. Deterministic, no LLM judge.
